role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market circumstances, the fund will maintain at least 80% exposure to financial instruments that provide two times leveraged exposure to the daily performance of CORZ. This may include CORZ stock in addition to financial instruments. The fund is non-diversified.

funds_data.description: Under normal market circumstances, the fund will maintain at least 80% exposure to financial instruments that provide two times leveraged exposure to the daily performance of CORZ. This may include CORZ stock in addition to financial instruments. The fund is non-diversified.
